name: GST 101 — Use of English
description: Test your knowledge of GST 101 topics

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a type of essay?
questions.explanation: The main types of essays are expository, narrative, descriptive, and argumentative. 'Illustrative' is not a standard essay type.

questions.question: The topic sentence of a paragraph should appear:
options: Only at the end of the paragraph
questions.explanation: The topic sentence usually appears at the beginning of a paragraph and introduces the main idea.
